overall.description: Gameplay footage from a racing simulator showing first-person night driving on a rain-soaked urban highway. The vehicle navigates through overpasses and light traffic with active windshield wipers, passing modern glass buildings and under highway sign gantries.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with concrete barriers

events.description: passing under first concrete overpass structure
exiting overpass, streetlights become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving on rain-soaked highway at night, approaching overpasses with wipers active

entered.detail: car dashboard with illuminated gauges and GPS screen
rain droplets covering windshield with active wiper streaks
metal guardrail running along right side of highway
concrete safety barrier on left side of highway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with first-person driving on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night. The vehicle approaches and passes under a concrete overpass, with the dashboard gauges illuminated and windshield wipers clearing heavy rain. Concrete barriers line the left side while metal guardrails run along the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway canyon with tall buildings

events.description: tall modern glass buildings become prominent on left side
approaching highway sign gantry with green directional signs

agents.ego_description: cruising along elevated highway with urban skyline visible on left

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle ahead in same lane with taillights visible

entered.detail: tall modern glass office buildings with illuminated windows
overhead gantry with green highway directional signs

segments.scene_description: Driving along an open section of the elevated highway with modern glass buildings rising on the left side. Streetlights line the road ahead, and a highway sign gantry becomes visible in the distance. The road remains wet with active rain, and a vehicle is visible ahead in the distance.

events.description: passing under overpass with green highway directional signs
overtaking red car on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: passing under highway sign gantry and overtaking red car on the right

notable_agents.action: red car being overtaken on the right side, moving slower than ego

entered.detail: concrete overpass with green highway signs mounted underneath

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under a large overpass carrying green highway directional signs, briefly entering a darker semi-covered zone. Exiting the underpass, the highway curves slightly right as the driver overtakes a red car on the right side. Urban buildings remain visible on the left while the road continues wet and rain-slicked.

events.description: passing under another concrete overpass structure
exiting overpass, streetlights visible again ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed on wet highway, passing under consecutive overpasses

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated highway, the vehicle approaches and passes under another concrete overpass. The urban buildings remain visible on the left side, and streetlights reappear ahead after exiting the underpass. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm against the heavy rain.

events.description: approaching and passing white car ahead in the same lane
slight right curve in the highway alignment

agents.ego_description: approaching slower traffic and navigating gentle right curve

notable_agents.action: white car ahead moving slower, being approached and passed

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle navigating a gentle right curve on the open highway, approaching and passing a white car ahead. The urban buildings recede into the left distance while the highway continues through the rainy night, with another overpass structure visible far ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway at night, transitioning through a series of concrete overpasses and open urban stretches. It begins by passing under a concrete overpass with illuminated dashboard gauges and active windshield wipers clearing heavy rain against a backdrop of concrete barriers and metal guardrails. As the road opens up, the camera glides past modern glass buildings on the left toward a distant highway sign gantry and a far-off vehicle. The scene then shifts into a darker semi-covered zone beneath green directional signs before curving right to overtake a red car under the glow of city streetlights. Finally, the vehicle passes under another concrete overpass and navigates a gentle right curve, passing a white car as the urban skyline recedes and another distant structure appears ahead through the persistent rain.
